panels.title: Both Signals Now
panels.description: Routes anomalous by both z-score and IsolationForest in latest window

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (o.route_id) o.route_id, o.updated_at, o.is_anomaly AS zscore_anomaly, COALESCE(CASE WHEN i.score_count > 0 THEN i.anomaly_count::float / i.score_count >= 0.5 ELSE i.iforest_anomaly END, false) AS iforest_anomaly FROM online_route_features o LEFT JOIN route_iforest_scores i ON i.route_id = o.route_id AND i.window_start = o.window_start AND i.iforest_score IS NOT NULL ORDER BY o.route_id, o.updated_at DESC) t WHERE t.updated_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '15 minutes' AND t.zscore_anomaly = true AND t.iforest_anomaly = true

panels.title: Z-Score Only Now
panels.description: Routes flagged by z-score only (not confirmed by IsolationForest)

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (o.route_id) o.route_id, o.updated_at, o.is_anomaly AS zscore_anomaly, COALESCE(CASE WHEN i.score_count > 0 THEN i.anomaly_count::float / i.score_count >= 0.5 ELSE i.iforest_anomaly END, false) AS iforest_anomaly FROM online_route_features o LEFT JOIN route_iforest_scores i ON i.route_id = o.route_id AND i.window_start = o.window_start AND i.iforest_score IS NOT NULL ORDER BY o.route_id, o.updated_at DESC) t WHERE t.updated_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '15 minutes' AND t.zscore_anomaly = true AND t.iforest_anomaly = false

panels.title: IForest Only Now
panels.description: Routes flagged by IsolationForest only (z-score is normal)

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (o.route_id) o.route_id, o.updated_at, o.is_anomaly AS zscore_anomaly, COALESCE(CASE WHEN i.score_count > 0 THEN i.anomaly_count::float / i.score_count >= 0.5 ELSE i.iforest_anomaly END, false) AS iforest_anomaly FROM online_route_features o LEFT JOIN route_iforest_scores i ON i.route_id = o.route_id AND i.window_start = o.window_start AND i.iforest_score IS NOT NULL ORDER BY o.route_id, o.updated_at DESC) t WHERE t.updated_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '15 minutes' AND t.zscore_anomaly = false AND t.iforest_anomaly = true

panels.title: Any Signal Now
panels.description: Routes flagged by at least one anomaly signal in latest window

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (o.route_id) o.route_id, o.updated_at, o.is_anomaly AS zscore_anomaly, COALESCE(CASE WHEN i.score_count > 0 THEN i.anomaly_count::float / i.score_count >= 0.5 ELSE i.iforest_anomaly END, false) AS iforest_anomaly FROM online_route_features o LEFT JOIN route_iforest_scores i ON i.route_id = o.route_id AND i.window_start = o.window_start AND i.iforest_score IS NOT NULL ORDER BY o.route_id, o.updated_at DESC) t WHERE t.updated_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '15 minutes' AND (t.zscore_anomaly = true OR t.iforest_anomaly = true)

panels.title: Tier Breakdown Over Time
panels.description: 5-minute buckets split by both signals, z-score only, and IForest only

targets.rawSql: SELECT bucket AS time, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE zscore_anomaly = true AND iforest_anomaly = true) AS both_signals, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE zscore_anomaly = true AND iforest_anomaly = false) AS zscore_only, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE zscore_anomaly = false AND iforest_anomaly = true) AS iforest_only FROM (SELECT date_trunc('hour', o.window_start) + INTERVAL '5 min' * FLOOR(EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM o.window_start) / 5.0) AS bucket, o.route_id, o.is_anomaly AS zscore_anomaly, COALESCE(CASE WHEN i.score_count > 0 THEN i.anomaly_count::float / i.score_count >= 0.5 ELSE i.iforest_anomaly END, false) AS iforest_anomaly FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (route_id, window_start) route_id, window_start, is_anomaly, updated_at FROM online_route_features WHERE $__timeFilter(window_start) ORDER BY route_id, window_start, updated_at DESC) o LEFT JOIN route_iforest_scores i ON i.route_id = o.route_id AND i.window_start = o.window_start AND i.iforest_score IS NOT NULL) t GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Current Tiered Anomalies
panels.description: Latest per-route anomalies classified by signal tier

targets.rawSql: SELECT t.route_id AS "Route", CASE WHEN t.zscore_anomaly = true AND t.iforest_anomaly = true THEN 'both_signals' WHEN t.zscore_anomaly = true THEN 'zscore_only' ELSE 'iforest_only' END AS "Tier", ROUND(t.duration_zscore::numeric, 2) AS "Z-Score", ROUND(t.iforest_score::numeric, 4) AS "IForest Score", ROUND(t.mean_duration_minutes::numeric, 1) AS "Mean Duration (min)", ROUND(t.last_duration_minutes::numeric, 1) AS "Last Duration (min)", TO_CHAR(t.updated_at, 'HH24:MI:SS') AS "Updated At" FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (o.route_id) o.route_id, o.updated_at, o.is_anomaly AS zscore_anomaly, o.duration_zscore, o.mean_duration_minutes, o.last_duration_minutes, COALESCE(CASE WHEN i.score_count > 0 THEN i.anomaly_count::float / i.score_count >= 0.5 ELSE i.iforest_anomaly END, false) AS iforest_anomaly, i.iforest_score FROM online_route_features o LEFT JOIN route_iforest_scores i ON i.route_id = o.route_id AND i.window_start = o.window_start AND i.iforest_score IS NOT NULL ORDER BY o.route_id, o.updated_at DESC) t WHERE t.updated_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '15 minutes' AND (t.zscore_anomaly = true OR t.iforest_anomaly = true) ORDER BY CASE WHEN t.zscore_anomaly = true AND t.iforest_anomaly = true THEN 0 WHEN t.zscore_anomaly = true THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, ABS(COALESCE(t.duration_zscore, 0)) DESC, t.iforest_score DESC NULLS LAST
